description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image and defines the variables BUILD_IMAGE_NAME as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF_SLUG, DOCKER_DRIVER as overlay2, and RELEASE_IMAGE_NAME as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest. Include four local pipeline fragments located at /build/pipeline/Build.gitlab-ci.yml, /build/pipeline/Release.gitlab-ci.yml, /build/pipeline/Review.gitlab-ci.yml, and /build/pipeline/Test.gitlab-ci.yml. Define the stages in this order: analyze, build, test, release, deploy, healthcheck, performance, cleanup, and notification. The included files will provide jobs for each of these stages, each running in the appropriate stage and using the alpine image unless overridden. Ensure the pipeline respects the stage ordering and variable definitions.
